mapper.sql: select id, access_number, iccid, imsi, msisdn, imei, operator, card_status, total_data, data_used, data_remaining, activate_time, expire_time, down_time, device_id, card_platform_id, data_alert_threshold, notify_users, data_plan, tenant_id, tenant_name, create_by, create_time, update_by, update_time, del_flag from iot_card
mapper.select: select operator `key`, count(1) count from iot_card where del_flag = 0 group by operator
select card_status as `key`, count(1) count from iot_card where del_flag = 0 group by card_status
select cp.platform `key`, count(1) count from iot_card c join iot_card_platform cp on c.card_platform_id = cp.id where c.del_flag = 0 and cp.del_flag = 0 group by cp.platform
